description: Machine-readable evidence index for zen-gc. Each entry describes whether evidence exists for a given category.

categories.name: Unit tests
categories.detail: go test ./... runs in CI. 65% coverage gate enforced.

categories.name: Integration tests
categories.detail: test/integration/ run in CI with controller-runtime envtest.

categories.name: Race detection
categories.detail: go test -v -race run in CI.

categories.name: Vulnerability scanning
categories.detail: govulncheck + gosec in CI security job. All 14 reachable vulnerabilities remediated: golang.org/x/net v0.47.0→v0.55.0, Go 1.26.0→1.26.4. govulncheck PASS.

categories.name: Kubernetes API compatibility (client-go version)
categories.detail: client-go v0.35 targets K8s 1.31.x.

categories.name: Kubernetes v1.36 kind validation
categories.detail: Validated on kind with K8s v1.36.1. Full CRD + runtime + real GC deletion matrix: 4 TTL modes (fixed, dynamic, mapped, relative) × Pod, ReplicaSet, ConfigMap, Secret, Job. Real deletion confirmed via controller logs.

categories.name: Kubernetes v1.36 k3d (K3s) validation
categories.detail: Validated on k3d with K3s v1.36.2+k3s1. Full CRD + runtime + real GC deletion matrix: 4 TTL modes (fixed, dynamic, mapped, relative) × Pod, ReplicaSet. Real deletion confirmed via controller logs.

categories.name: Kubernetes v1.36 kubeadm validation
categories.detail: Validated on kubeadm with K8s v1.36.2 (single control-plane, flannel CNI, containerd 2.2.5). CRDs registered, CRUD operations pass, schema validation enforces types. Full controller runtime + GC deletion behavior validated.

categories.name: Kubernetes v1.34 kubeadm validation
categories.detail: Validated on kubeadm with K8s v1.34.9 (single control-plane, flannel CNI). CRDs registered, CRUD operations pass, schema validation enforces types. Full controller runtime + GC deletion behavior validated with containerd 2.2.5.

categories.name: Cloud Kubernetes E2E
categories.detail: No EKS/GKE/AKS E2E tests or results published.

categories.name: Container image build
categories.detail: Multi-arch (amd64, arm64) image built in CI.

categories.name: Leader election safety (kind)
categories.detail: Validated on kind with K8s v1.36.1 (2 and 3 controller replicas). Single leader, non-leader idle, leader failover works, no cross-leader duplicate deletions, matching resources deleted after TTL, control resources retained.

categories.name: Leader election public claims
categories.detail: Public claims qualified: leader-election validated on kind only; not a cloud HA or multi-node HA claim.

categories.name: Helm chart
categories.detail: Chart published to Artifact Hub. Version 0.0.1-alpha.

categories.name: Release evidence documentation
categories.detail: Template exists; no release-specific evidence files populated.

categories.name: SBOM
categories.detail: No CycloneDX/SPDX SBOM generated during build.

categories.name: SLSA provenance
categories.detail: No build attestation published.

categories.name: Security policy
categories.detail: Vulnerability disclosure policy documented.

categories.detail: Automated updates for Go modules, Docker, and GitHub Actions.
